meaning: 在各種意義上，令人煩惱或令人失望的糟糕；糟糕、老套、卑鄙、不酷、一團糟。
sentences: Every record they ever made was straight-up wack. 他們製作的每張唱片都非常古怪。
The report describes the result as wack. 報告稱這項結果很奇怪。
We had to wade across the shallow stream to get to the other side. 我們不得不涉水穿過淺灘溪流以到達另一邊。
The children enjoyed a gentle wade in the cool water of the lake. 孩子們喜歡在涼爽的湖水中輕輕地涉水。
The pool is too small for doing laps: it’s only a wading pool. 泳池太小，無法繞圈：它只是一個淺水池。
The report describes the result as wading. 報告將結果描述為涉水。
The surfer caught a massive wae and rode it all the way to the shore. 衝浪者抓到一個巨大的浪，並一路滑向岸邊。
She gave a friendly wae to her neighbor from across the street. 她從街對面親切地向鄰居揮手。

meaning: 浪潮，湧現 (修正為 wave rose)
sentences: A sudden wae rose in the distance as the storm approached. 隨著風暴接近，遠處突然湧現了一陣浪潮。
A wae rose of enthusiasm swept through the crowd after the announcement. 宣佈後，一股熱情浪潮席捲了人群。

meaning: 晶圓，威化餅 (修正為 wafer)
sentences: Silicon wafs are used in the manufacturing of computer chips. 矽晶圓被用於製造電腦晶片。
The child enjoyed eating a crispy chocolate waf for a snack. 孩子喜歡吃脆皮巧克力威化餅當零食。
She ordered a fresh waffle with strawberries and cream for breakfast. 她點了一份配有草莓和鮮奶油的新鮮格子鬆餅當早餐。
Stop trying to waffle and just give me a straight answer. 別再胡扯了，直接給我一個明確的回答。
The dog began to wag its tail with excitement when its owner arrived. 當主人回來時，這隻狗興奮地搖起了尾巴。
He is a bit of a wag and always has a funny joke to tell his friends. 他有點愛開玩笑，總能給朋友們講些有趣的笑話。
The company agreed to increase the minimum hourly wage for its workers. 公司同意提高工人的最低時薪。
The government is determined to wage war against drug trafficking. 政府決心開展打擊毒品販運的戰爭。
The workers are campaigning for a higher minimum hourly wage. 工人們正在爭取更高的最低時薪。
He earns a decent wage at the local international bank in Taipei. 他在台北當地的國際銀行領取優渥的薪資（薪水）。

meaning: 打賭某事；將其作為抵押品。
sentences: I'd wager my boots on it. 我願意用我的靴子打賭。
To wager means to bet something; to put it up as collateral. 下注意味著打賭某事；將其作為抵押品。
His repeated wagerings of his allowances led him to ruin. 他反覆 下注 他的津貼導致他破產。 他反覆用自己的津貼下注，導致他破產。 他反复支付了他的津貼導致他破產。
The term wagering refers to An amount wagered. 術語「下注」是指下注的金額。 術語「下注」是指下注的金額。 術語“下注”是指下注的金額。
Factory workers demanded higher wages. 工廠工人要求提高工資。
The term wages refers to one's total income for a time period. 工資一詞是指一個人在一段時間內的總收入。
The farmer used a wooden wagon to transport his heavy crops. 農夫用一輛木車（車皮）來運送他沈重的莊稼。
The children were happily playing in the colorful wooden wagon. 孩子們正在彩色木車裡開心地玩耍。
The baby began to wail loudly when she realized her mother had left. 當寶寶意識到母親離開時，開始大聲嚎啕大哭。
The wail of the ambulance siren could be heard in the distance. 遠處可以聽到救護車警報器的哀號聲。
She wore a beautiful silk scarf tied around her slim waist. 她在纖細的腰間圍了一條漂亮的絲巾。
The water in the swimming pool was up to my waist. 游泳池裡的水深及我的腰部。
We had to walk through waist-deep snow to reach the cabin. 我們不得不穿過深及腰部的積雪才能到達小屋。
The floodwaters were waist-deep in some parts of the city. 城市某些部分的洪水深及腰部。
The trousers have an elastic waistband for extra comfort. 這條長褲有彈性褲腰以增加舒適度。
She adjusted the waistband of her skirt before going on stage. 她上台前調整了一下裙子的腰帶。
He wore a formal three-piece suit with a matching waistcoat. 他穿著一套正式的三件式西裝，配有相稱的背心。
The waiter looked very professional in his black waistcoat and white shirt. 侍者穿著黑色背心和白色襯衫，看起來非常專業。
He is trying to exercise more to reduce his waistline. 他正試圖多運動以縮小腰圍。
The dress is designed with a high waistline that is very flattering. 這件洋裝設計有高腰線（腰圍處較高），非常顯瘦。
Please wait here until the manager is ready to see you. 請在這裡等候，直到經理準備好見您。
I've been waiting for the bus for over twenty minutes. 我等公車等了二十多分鐘了。
The waiter recommended the chef's special pasta dish for tonight. 侍者推薦了今晚主廚特別推薦的義大利麵。
He worked as a waiter in a busy downtown restaurant during the summer. 他夏天在市中心一家繁忙的餐廳當侍者。
The waiter was very polite and provided excellent service to us. 男服務生非常有禮貌，為我們提供了優質的服務。
The waitress recommended the chef's special seafood dish. 女服務生推薦了主廚特製的海鮮料理。
I have been waiting for the bus for over twenty minutes now. 我已經等公車等了二十多分鐘了。
There is a large crowd of people waiting outside the theater. 劇院外有一大群人在等待。
Please take a seat in the waiting room until the doctor is ready. 在醫生準備好之前，請先在候診室坐一下。
The airport waiting room was crowded with travelers during the holidays. 假期期間，機場候車室擠滿了旅客。
The waitress provided excellent service throughout the evening. 那位女侍者整個晚上都提供了極佳的服務。
She worked as a part-time waitress to help pay for her college tuition. 她當兼職女侍者以幫助支付大學學費。

meaning: 放棄（權利等）；放棄主張；放棄。
sentences: If you waive the right to be silent, anything you say can be used against you in a court of law. 如果您放棄保持沉默的權利，您所說的任何話都可能在法庭上對您不利。
To waive means to relinquish (a right etc.); to give up claim to; to forgo. 放棄意味著放棄（權利等）；放棄主張；放棄。
I needed a waiver from the department head to take the course because I didn't technically have the prerequisite courses. 我需要獲得系主任的豁免才能參加該課程，因為從技術上講我沒有先修課程。
I needed a waiver from the zoning board for the house because the lot was so small, but they let me build because it was next to the park. 我需要獲得房屋規劃委員會的豁免，因為地塊太小，但他們讓我建造，因為它靠近公園。
What time do you usually wake up in the morning? 你通常早上幾點醒來？
The alarm clock woke me up at 6:30 this morning. 鬧鐘今天早上六點半把我叫醒。
She spent a wakeful night worrying about her upcoming exam. 她因擔心即將到來的考試而徹夜難眠（失眠）。
The dog remained wakeful and alert to any strange noises outside. 這隻狗保持警覺，留意著外面的任何怪聲。
We should try to 'waken' the problem from a different angle. 我們應該嘗試從不同角度來「waken」這個問題。
The new software will help us 'waken' tasks more efficiently. 這款新軟體將幫助我們更有效地「waken」任務。
He spends every waking hour thinking about his new business project. 他清醒時的每一刻都在思考他的新商業計畫。
It was like a waking dream that I couldn't quite explain. 那就像是一場我無法解釋的清醒夢。
I usually go for a walk in the park after dinner. 我通常晚餐後去公園散步。
It takes about fifteen minutes to walk from here to the station. 從這裡走路到車站大約需要十五分鐘。
They walked along the beach and enjoyed the sunset. 他們沿著海灘漫步並欣賞日落。
I have walked this path many times before. 我以前走過這條路很多次。
The park is popular with morning walkers and joggers. 這個公園很受晨運步行者和慢跑者的歡迎。
The elderly man uses a walker to help him move around safely. 那位老人使用助行器來幫助他安全地走動。
Walking is a simple and effective form of exercise. 走路是一種簡單且有效的運動形式。
The shop sells a variety of comfortable walking shoes. 這家店販售各式各樣舒適的健行鞋。
He leaned on his walking stick as he climbed the hill. 他在爬山時靠著他的手杖。
My grandfather has a collection of antique walking sticks. 我祖父收藏了一批古董手杖。

meaning: 人們以 抗議 形式離開某個地方的類似大規模行動。
sentences: The term walkout refers to A similar mass action of people leaving a place as a form of protest. 罷工一詞指的是人們離開某個地方的類似大規模行動，以 抗議 的形式。 罷工一詞指的是人們離開某個地方作為抗議形式的類似大規模行動。 抗議指的是人們離開某個地方的類似大規模行動，以抗議的形式。
The lesson introduced walkout as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「罷工」作為一個易於理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了「罷工」作為一個易於理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了“工會”作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The covered walkway protects pedestrians from the rain. 有遮蓋的走道保護行人免受雨淋。
A wooden walkway leads from the hotel directly to the beach. 一條木製走道從飯店直接通往海灘。
There is a beautiful painting hanging on the living room wall. 客廳牆上掛著一幅漂亮的畫。
The Great Wall of China is one of the most famous landmarks in the world. 中國長城是世界上最著名的地標之一。
The wall lamp provides a soft and warm light for reading in bed. 這盞壁燈為在床上閱讀提供了柔和溫暖的光線。
They installed two elegant wall lamps in the hallway. 他們在走廊安裝了兩盞優雅的壁燈。
A wall-mounted television can save space in a small room. 壁掛式電視可以節省小房間的空間。
The bathroom has a wall-mounted mirror and cabinet. 浴室裡有一個壁掛式的鏡子和櫃子。
The term waller refers to the place where animals make their bed. Waller一詞指的是動物鋪床的地方。
The lesson introduced waller as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 Waller 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
He reached into his pocket and pulled out his leather wallet. 他伸進口袋掏出了皮夾。
I need to buy a new wallet because my old one is worn out. 我需要買個新錢包，因為我的舊錢包磨損了。
The stone walling of the cottage is very traditional and charming. 這棟小屋的石牆結構非常傳統且迷人。
The construction team is busy finishing the walling of the new house. 建築團隊正忙著完成新房子的牆壁工程。

meaning: 在骯髒的東西上打滾，例如泥巴里。
sentences: Pigs wallow in the mud. 豬在泥裡打滾。
People often wallow when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會沉迷其中。
They chose a floral wallpaper for their bedroom. 他們為臥室選了一款花卉圖案的壁紙。
It took them the entire weekend to wallpaper the dining room. 他們花了整個週末給餐廳貼壁紙。

meaning: 一個大的醃小黃瓜或黃瓜。
sentences: The term wally refers to a large pickled gherkin or cucumber. 「沃利」一詞指的是醃製的大黃瓜或黃瓜。
The lesson introduced wally as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 wally 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
She added some chopped walnuts to the cake batter for extra flavor. 她在蛋糕麵糊裡加了一些碎核桃以增加風味。
He bought a beautiful wooden desk made of high-quality solid walnut. 他買了一張用優質實心胡桃木製成的漂亮書桌。
To walt means to turn; cast; hurl; fling; overturn. walt 的意思是轉動；投擲;投;一扔;顛覆。
People may walt in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下做出不同的舉動。
They waltzed for twenty-one hours and seventeen minutes straight, setting a record. 他們連續跳華爾滋二十一小時十七分鐘，創下了紀錄。
While waltzing her around the room, he stepped on her toes only once. 當她在房間裡跳著華爾滋時，他只踩到了她的腳趾一次。
She looked wan and tired after her long illness. 在大病一場後，她看起來臉色蒼白且疲憊。
He gave a wan smile to show he was feeling a little better. 他露出一抹無力的微笑，表示他感覺好一點了。

meaning: 魔術師（魔杖）、魔術師或占卜師使用的棍子或棒（占卜棒）。
sentences: The term wand refers to a stick or rod used by a magician (a magic wand), conjurer or diviner (divining rod). 魔杖一詞是指魔術師（魔杖）、魔術師或占卜師（占卜棒）使用的棍子或棒子。
The lesson introduced wand as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「魔杖」這個易於理解的有用術語。
We spent the afternoon wandering through the narrow city streets. 我們花了一下午在城市狹窄的街道中漫步（徘徊）。
His mind managed to wander during the long and boring meeting. 他的心思在那場漫長乏味的會議中竟然開小差（漫遊）了。
The term wanderer refers to The wandering albatross, Diomedea exulans. 流浪者一詞指的是流浪信天翁 Diomedea exulans。
We learned the meaning of wanderer during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了流浪者的意義。

meaning: 能夠異常地向某些方向移動。
sentences: a wandering kidney; a wandering liver 流浪的腎臟；流浪的肝臟
The report describes the result as wandering. 報告將結果描述為「徘徊」。
Support for the government has begun to wane in recent months. 近幾個月對政府的支持率已開始下降（衰落）。
The moon will wane after it reaches its full phase. 月亮在滿月後會開始虧缺。
He wang the metal rod against the stone to make a loud noise. 他猛擊金屬棒敲在石頭上發出巨響。
The door closed with a loud wang. 門砰的一聲猛力關上了。
my patience is waning 我的耐心正在減弱
The report describes the result as waning. 報告稱這一結果正在減弱。
I want to travel around the world and see different cultures. 我想環遊世界，看看不同的文化。
What do you want to be when you grow up? 你長大後想當什麼？
The police are looking for a man who is wanted for robbery. 警方正在尋找一名因搶劫而被通緝的男子。
She finally felt wanted and appreciated in her new job. 她在新工作中終於感到被需要與被賞識。

meaning: 浪費或揮霍，尤其是在快樂中（最常見的是離開）。
sentences: The young man wantoned away his inheritance. 這個年輕人肆意奪走了他的遺產。
People often wanton when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會肆意妄為。

meaning: 想要（第三人稱單數），需求
sentences: He wants to become a pilot when he grows up. 他長大後想成為一名飛行員。
The charity aims to meet the basic wants of the homeless population. 該慈善機構旨在滿足無家可歸者的基本需求。
The novel tells a moving story about people living during the war. 這部小說講述了一個關於戰爭期間生活的人們的感人故事。
Peace and diplomacy are essential to avoid the horrors of war. 和平與外交對於避免戰爭恐怖至關重要。

meaning: 進行戰爭的藝術或技巧。
sentences: The term warcraft refers to the art or skill of conducting a war. 魔獸爭霸一詞指的是進行戰爭的藝術或技巧。
The lesson introduced warcraft as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了魔獸爭霸這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The patient was moved to a private ward following the major surgery. 病人在大手術後被轉移到了私人病房。
She represents the local community as a councillor for her ward. 她作為該選區的議員代表當地社區。
The park warden is responsible for protecting the local wildlife. 公園管理員負責保護當地的野生動物。
He was appointed as the new warden of the prison last month. 他上個月被任命為該監獄的新典獄長。
She kept all her beautiful dresses and accessories in the large wardrobe. 她把所有漂亮的洋裝和飾品都放在那個大衣櫃裡。
The young actress has a very impressive wardrobe for her film roles. 這位年輕女演員為她的電影角色準備了非常令人驚嘆的全部服裝。

meaning: 製品，貨物 (常作字尾，如 software, glassware)
sentences: The shop sells a variety of kitchen ware and home accessories. 這家店販售各種廚房製品和居家配件。
Merchants displayed their wares in the busy market square. 商人們在繁忙的市場廣場上展示他們的貨物。
The company uses a large warehouse to store its products before shipping. 公司利用一個大倉庫在發貨前存放產品。
The old warehouse has been converted into a creative arts and media center. 舊倉庫已被改建為創意藝術和媒體中心。
The fishing boats are docked at the local warf. 漁船停靠在當地的碼頭。
We walked along the warf and watched the ships come in. 我們沿著碼頭散步，看著船隻進港。

meaning: 過軍旅生活；進行持續不斷的戰爭。
sentences: To warfare means to lead a military life; to carry on continual wars. 打仗就是過軍旅生活；進行持續不斷的戰爭。
People may warfare in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下發生戰爭。
The weather is getting warm as spring approaches. 隨著春天臨近，天氣變得暖和了。
Please wear a warm coat; it's quite chilly outside. 請穿件保暖的大衣，外面挺冷的。

meaning: 透過提供少量熱量來加熱（其他東西）的東西，例如熱水瓶或湯。
sentences: The term warmer refers to something that warms (something else) by providing some small amount of heat, such as a hot water bottle or a soup. 術語「溫暖器」是指透過提供少量熱量來加熱（其他東西）的東西，例如熱水瓶或湯。
The lesson introduced warmer as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「溫暖」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 以保持溫暖溫度的方式。
sentences: Be sure to dress warmly today! 今天一定要穿得暖和一點！
If someone acts warmly, they do so in a way that is in a manner that maintains warm temperature. 如果有人表現得很熱情，他們會以保持溫暖的方式這樣做。
I love the warmth of the spring sun on a cool morning. 我喜愛涼爽早晨春日陽光的溫暖。
She was deeply moved by the warmth and kindness of the people. 她被那些人們的溫暖與善良深深打動。
The doctor warned him to stop smoking for his overall health. 醫生警告他為了整體健康應戒菸。
The sign warns of the danger of falling rocks on the road. 告示牌警告道路上有落石危險。
The siren gave a loud warning that the storm was approaching. 警報器發出強烈的警告，預示風暴即將來臨。
There were no warning signs before the system crashed. 系統崩潰前沒有任何預兆（警告跡象）。

meaning: 身體或精神上扭曲或變得扭曲。使（某物）扭曲或變形；變形。
sentences: The moisture warped the board badly. 濕氣使電路板嚴重變形。
to warp space and time 扭曲空間和時間

meaning: 一個人的思想、態度等，是乖張的、奇怪的、反常的或離經叛道的。
sentences: a warped sense of humour 扭曲的幽默感
The report describes the result as warped. 該報告將結果描述為扭曲的。
The police obtained a search warrant before entering the suspicious house. 警方在進入那座可疑房屋前獲取了搜查令。
The news of the accident was serious enough to warrant immediate action. 事故的消息非常嚴重，足以保證（值得）立即採取行動。
The new smartphone comes with a two-year warranty for any defects. 這款新智慧型手機對任何缺陷提供兩年保固。

Regular exercise and a balanced diet can help you lose weight. 定期運動與均衡飲食能幫助妳減肥。
There is a weight limit for each suitcase on the airplane. 飛機上的每個行李箱都有重量限制。
She wore a weighted dress so it wouldn't blow in the wind. 她穿著一件厚重的裙子，這樣風就不會飄動。
The report describes the result as weighted. 該報告將結果描述為加權的。

meaning: 跨河放置的可調式水壩，用於調節下游水流。
sentences: The term weir refers to an adjustable dam placed across a river to regulate the flow of water downstream. 堰一詞是指跨河放置的可調式水壩，用於調節下游水流。
The lesson introduced weir as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了堰作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
He told us a weird story about his encounter with a ghost in the woods. 他給我們講了一個在森林裡遇到鬼的怪異故事。
The movie features several weird characters and unexpected plot twists. 這部電影有幾個怪異的人物和出人意料的情節轉折。
Weirdly, Alice showed up 10 minutes early. She was usually late for everything. 奇怪的是，爱丽丝提前十分钟出现了。她通常凡事都會遲到。
The roughness of the wool was weirdly pleasant. 羊毛的粗糙度出奇地令人愉悅。
Welcome to our home! Please make yourself comfortable. 歡迎來到我家！請隨便坐，別客氣。
You are more than welcome to join our study group. 非常歡迎你加入我們的學習小組。
The mechanic needs to weld the two metal plates together. 技師需要將這兩塊金屬板焊接在一起。
A common cause can weld diverse groups into a single movement. 共同的目標可以將不同的群體結合成一個單一的運動。

meaning: 經理 ；一個實際的 佔用者 ；農民或中間人持有的土地佃戶。
sentences: The term welder refers to A manager; an actual occupant; a land-tenant holding under the farmer or middleman. 焊工一詞指的是 經理 ；一個實際的 佔用者 ；佃戶或中間人持有的土地中間人持有的土地。 焊工一詞指的是A經理；實際居住者；農民或中間人持有的土地佃戶。 焊工指的是經理；一個實際的佔用者；佃戶或中間人持有的土地中間人持有的土地。
The lesson introduced welder as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了焊工這個易於理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了焊工這個易於理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了焊工這個易於理解的有用術語。
The government is responsible for the welfare of its citizens, especially the vulnerable. 政府有責任照顧公民的福利，特別是弱勢群體。
The organization works to improve the health and welfare of children in developing countries. 該組織致力於改善發展中國家兒童的健康與福祉（福利）。
I hope you are doing well and enjoying your new job. 我希望你過得很好，並且喜歡你的新工作。
The business is running well under the new management. 業務在新管理層的領導下運作良好。

meaning: Wellington 的替代字母大小寫形式（靴子）。
sentences: The term wellington refers to alternative letter-case form of Wellington (the boot). Wellington 一詞是指 Wellington（靴子）的替代字母大小寫形式。
The lesson introduced wellington as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了惠靈頓這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 了解並參與可能帶來最佳健康的行為的過程。
sentences: She made a fortune as a wellness guru. 她作為健康專家賺了一大筆錢。
The term wellness refers to The process of learning about and engaging in behaviors that are likely to result in optimal health. 健康一詞是指學習和參與可能帶來最佳健康的行為的過程。

meaning: 欺騙或欺騙某人，通常是不償還債務，尤其是賭債。
sentences: To welsh means to cheat or swindle someone, often by not paying a debt, especially a gambling debt. 威爾斯語的意思是欺騙或詐騙某人，通常是不償還債務，尤其是賭債。
People may welsh in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會遇到不同的情況。

meaning: 一門課程；一條路，一條路；一段旅程。
sentences: The term went refers to a course; a way, a path; a journey. 「goed」一詞指的是一門課程；一條路，一條路；一次旅程。
The lesson introduced went as a useful term to understand. 所介紹的課程是一個值得理解的有用術語。

meaning: 指示 be 的第二人稱單數簡單過去式。
sentences: John, you were the only person to see him. 約翰，你是唯一見到他的人。
To were means to second-person singular simple past indicative of be. To were 表示第二人稱單數過去式指示 be。

meaning: 轉變為或可以轉變為狼或類似狼的人的人，通常據說是在滿月期間這樣做的。
sentences: The term werewolf refers to a person who is transformed or can transform into a wolf or a wolflike human, often said to do so during a full moon. 狼人一詞指的是被轉變為或能夠轉變為狼或類狼人類的人，通常據說是在滿月期間這樣做。
The lesson introduced werewolf as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了狼人這個易於理解的有用術語。
The sun rises in the east and sets in the west. 太陽從東方升起，從西方落下。
Taichung is located in the western part of Taiwan. 台中位於台灣的中部偏西地區。
He was driving westbound on the George Washington Bridge. 他當時正在喬治華盛頓大橋上向西行駛。
The team responded westbound to the change. 團隊向西行響應這項變更。
a westerly course or voyage 西風航線或航程
The report describes the result as westerly. 報告將結果描述為西風。
The city is a fascinating blend of eastern and western cultures. 這座城市是東西方文化的迷人融合。
Many western countries have high standards of living and health. 許多西方國家擁有高水準的生活與健康。
ride westward. 向西騎行。
If someone acts westward, they do so in a way that is toward the west. 如果有人向西行事，他就會以向西的方式行事。
The grass was wet with morning dew. 草地上沾滿了晨露。
Don't sit on that bench; the paint is still wet. 別坐在那張長椅上，油漆還沒乾。

meaning: 一次嘗試，一次機會，一次轉身，一次嘗試，最初是試圖擊敗某人或某事。
sentences: C'mon. Take a whack at it. 來吧。猛擊一下它。
40 bucks a whack. 40塊錢一拳。
The blue whale is the largest animal that has ever lived on Earth. 藍鯨是地球上曾存在過的最大動物。
We went on a boat trip to see the magnificent whales in the ocean. 我們乘船去觀賞大海中壯觀的鯨魚。
The cargo ship was moored at the wharf, and workers started to unload it. 貨船停靠在碼頭，工人們開始卸貨。
We enjoyed a pleasant walk along the busy wharf and watched the boats. 我們在繁忙的碼頭邊愉快地散步並看船。
What is your favorite subject at school? Mine is science. 你在學校最喜歡的科目是什麼？我的是科學。
What time does the next train to Taipei leave? 下一班去台北的火車幾點開？
You can choose whatever you like from the menu; it's on me. 你可以從菜單上隨便點妳喜歡的，我請客。
Whatever happens, I will always be there to support you. 無論發生什麼事，我都會一直在妳身邊支持妳。

meaning: 其他相關的物體或想法。
sentences: At the lexicography club, we welcome all discussion of words and whatnot. 在字典編纂俱樂部，我們歡迎所有關於單字之類的討論。
All of the cakes and whatnot have been laid out, ready for the children's birthday party this afternoon. 所有的蛋糕什麼的都已經擺好了，準備今天下午孩子們的生日派對。
There is no evidence whatsoever to support his claims about the project. 沒有任何證據（絲毫沒有）支持他對該專案的說法。
She showed no interest whatsoever in the movie and fell asleep halfway. 她對這部電影絲毫提不起興趣，看了一半就睡著了。
Farmers in this fertile region grow high-quality organic wheat. 這個肥沃地區的農夫種植高品質的有機小麥。
Wheat is a key ingredient in many types of bread and cereal. 小麥是多種麵包與穀物的主要食材。
The steering wheel of the new car is covered in soft leather. 新車的方向盤覆蓋著柔軟的皮革。
The invention of the wheel was a major milestone in history. 輪子的發明是歷史上的一個重大里程碑。
The building is fully accessible to people who use a wheelchair. 該建築完全開放給使用輪椅的人士進入。
He needed a wheelchair to get around after breaking both his legs. 雙腿骨折後，他需要坐輪椅才能四處走動。

meaning: 具有指定數量或類型的車輪。
sentences: a three- wheeled car 三輪汽車
an iron- wheeled chariot 鐵輪戰車
The term wheeler refers to someone who operates a wheel. 術語“輪子”指的是操作輪子的人。
The lesson introduced wheeler as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了惠勒這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
the wheelings of birds in the sky 天空中鳥兒的盤旋
The term wheeling refers to The motion of something that wheels. 術語「轉動」是指轉動物體的運動。
The elderly man began to wheeze after climbing the stairs. 那位老人在爬完樓梯後開始喘氣（發出喘鳴聲）。
He has a persistent wheeze due to his asthma. 因為哮喘，他有持續性的喘鳴。
When did you start learning how to speak English? 你什麼時候開始學說英文的？
Please let me know when you arrive home safely. 妳平安到家後請告訴我一聲。

meaning: 來自 哪裡 ；來自哪個 哪裡 ；來自哪個 ； rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/source" title="source">來源 。
sentences: Whence came I? 我從哪裡來 ？ 我從哪裡來？ 我從哪裡來？
"Pork" comes from French, whence we get most of our modern cooking terms. 「豬肉」來自法語， 從這裡 我們得到了大部分現代烹飪術語。 「豬肉」來自法語，我們大部分現代烹飪術語都是從法語中獲得的。 「豬肉」來自現代，從這裡我們得到了大部分烹飪術語。
Please feel free to call me whenever you need any help. 只要妳需要任何幫助，隨時都可以打電話給我。
Whenever I listen to this song, it reminds me of my childhood. 每當我聽這首歌，它都會讓我想起童年。
Where are you from? I'm from Taipei, Taiwan. 你從哪裡來？我來自台灣台北。
I don't know where I left my car keys. 我不知道我把車鑰匙放在哪裡了。
The police are still trying to determine the whereabouts of the suspect. 警方仍在試圖確定嫌疑人的行蹤（下落）。
His whereabouts remained a mystery for several years after his disappearance. 在他失蹤後的幾年裡，他的下落一直是一個謎。
She enjoys hiking in the mountains, whereas her husband prefers the beach. 她喜歡在山裡健行，而（然而）她的丈夫更喜歡海灘。
Some people thrive under pressure, whereas others find it very stressful. 有些人在壓力下表現出色，反之有些人則覺得壓力很大。

meaning: 透過什麼，向哪個方向；如何。
sentences: Whereby goest thou? 你要去哪裡？
If someone acts whereby, they do so in a way that is by what, in which direction; how. 如果某人採取行動，他們會以某種方式這樣做，即透過什麼，朝哪個方向；如何。
Wherein did I misspeak myself? 我自己哪裡說錯了？
If someone acts wherein, they do so in a way that is how, or in what way. 如果某人採取其中行動，他們會以何種方式或以什麼方式這樣做。
The network went down, whereupon I made a cup of tea 網路壞了，於是我泡了一杯茶
The word whereupon is used to connect ideas in a sentence. 「whereupon」一詞用於連接句子中的想法。
You can park your car wherever you find an empty space. 只要有空位，妳可以把車停在任何地方。
Wherever you go in Taiwan, you can find delicious local food. 無論妳在台灣哪裡，都能找到美味的當地小吃。
I'm not sure whether I can attend the meeting tomorrow. 我不確定明天是否能參加會議。
The decision depends on whether we can get enough funding. 決定取決於我們是否能獲得足夠的資金。

meaning: 發出富有表現力的聲音，表示釋放內心的緊張；呼吸的釋放；一種寬慰的表達。
sentences: Whew! That box weighs a ton! 哇！那個盒子有一噸重！
Whew! Thank goodness youʼre safe! I thought something terrible had happened to you! 哇！謝天謝地，你很安全！我以為你發生了可怕的事！

meaning: 在製作起司的過程中，牛奶凝結並過濾後剩餘的液體。
sentences: The term whey refers to the liquid remaining after milk has been curdled and strained in the process of making cheese. 乳清一詞是指在製作乳酪的過程中牛奶凝結和過濾後剩餘的液體。
The lesson introduced whey as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了乳清作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
Which of these two beautiful dresses do you prefer? 這兩件漂亮的洋裝妳比較喜歡哪一件？
The book which I borrowed from the library was very interesting. 我從圖書館借的那本書非常有趣。
Good heavens! Whichever button did you press to make that happen?! 天哪！無論您按下哪個按鈕來實現這一點？
The word whichever is used in English writing and speech. 該詞以英語寫作和演講中使用的為準。

meaning: 一陣短暫而柔和的微風；一陣輕風；一陣風。
sentences: The term whiff refers to a brief, gentle breeze; a light gust of air; a waft. 「wiff」一詞指的是一陣短暫、柔和的微風；一陣輕風；一陣風。
The lesson introduced whiff as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「whiff」這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
I like to listen to music while I'm studying to help me focus. 我喜歡在唸書時聽音樂，以幫助我集中注意力。
The phone rang while I was taking a shower this morning. 我今天早上洗澡時電話響了。

meaning: 在整個時間或直到結束時；只要、同時。
sentences: Drivers must switch off engines whilst on stand. 駕駛員必須在停車時關閉引擎。
The word whilst is used to connect ideas in a sentence. while 這個字用來連結句子中的想法。
He bought the expensive sports car on a whim. 他一時興起（突發奇想）買了那輛昂貴的跑車。
She often changes her plans according to her every whim. 她經常根據自己的隨興想法改變計畫。
The dog began to whine at the door, wanting to go outside for a walk. 狗在門口開始哀鳴，想出去散步。
Stop whining about the small problems and try to find a solution. 別再為那些小問題發牢騷（抱怨）了，試著找個解決方案。
The rider used a leather whip to encourage the horse to run. 騎手用皮鞭鼓勵馬兒跑動。
She learned how to whip fresh cream until it becomes thick. 她學會了如何攪打（鞭打）鮮奶油直到變稠。
To whiplash means to jerk back and forth; to buffet. 鞭打的意思是來回猛拉；自助餐。
People may whiplash in different situations depending on the context. 根据具体情况，人们可能会在不同的情况下挥鞭。

meaning: 快速旋轉、公轉、旋轉或轉向。
sentences: The dancer whirled across the stage, stopped, and whirled around to face the audience. 舞者旋轉穿過舞台，停了下來，然後旋轉面向觀眾。
People often whirl when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會感到困惑。
a whirling carousel; whirling dancers 旋轉的旋轉木馬；旋轉舞者
The report describes the result as whirling. 報告稱這項結果令人震驚。
A whirlpool is an instance of a vortex produced by ocean tides, or by a hole underneath where the water would drain out, such as in a bathtub. 漩渦是由海洋潮汐或下面的孔（例如浴缸中的水排出處）產生的渦流的一個例子。
The term whirlpool refers to A swirling body of water. 漩渦一詞指的是旋轉的水體。

meaning: 猛烈向前掃過的人或物體或事件。
sentences: Once he got that new scooter he turned into a whirlwind and damaged all the flowers. 一旦他得到了那輛新摩托車，他就變成了旋風，損壞了所有的花朵。
The weeks leading up to the convention were a whirlwind of preparation and hurried activity. 大會召開前的幾週是一場旋風般的準備和匆忙的活動。
The celebrity was whisked away by her bodyguards to avoid the crowd. 那位名人被保鏢快速帶走以避開人群。
Use a wire whisk to mix the eggs and milk together. 使用金屬攪拌器將雞蛋和牛奶混合在一起。
The cat cleaned its whiskers after finishing its meal. 貓咪吃完飯後清理了自己的鬍鬚。
He missed the target by a whisker. 他差一點點（差一根鬍鬚的距離）就擊中了目標。
The old man enjoyed a glass of fine Scottish whiskey after his dinner. 老人喜歡在晚飯後喝一杯上好的蘇格蘭威士忌。
Whiskey is a popular alcoholic beverage produced in many countries. 威士忌是許多國家都有生產的一種受歡迎的含酒精飲料。
He enjoys sipping a glass of fine Scotch whisky by the fireplace. 他喜歡在壁爐旁啜飲一杯優質的蘇格蘭威士忌。
The shop has a wide selection of whiskies from around the world. 這家店有來自世界各地的多種威士忌可供選擇。
She whispered something softly into my ear so no one could hear. 她在我耳邊輕聲說了些什麼，以免別人聽到。
The secret was shared in a quiet whisper during the meeting. 這個秘密在會議期間以小聲的耳語傳達。
The train gave a loud blast of its whistle as it left station. 火車離開車站時發出了響亮的汽笛（哨）聲。
He whistled a simple melody while he was working in the garden. 他在花園裡忙活時吹著一段簡單的曲子。

meaning: 吹口哨的人或物，或吹口哨作為樂器的人。
sentences: The term whistler refers to someone or something that whistles, or who plays a whistle as a musical instrument. 口哨者一詞指的是吹口哨的人或物，或將口哨作為樂器演奏的人。
The lesson introduced whistler as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了口哨這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 尖銳的呼吸聲；一聲口哨。
sentences: The term whistling refers to A shrill, breathy sound; a whistle. 口哨一詞是指一種尖銳的呼吸聲；一聲口哨。
We learned the meaning of whistling during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了吹口哨的意思。

meaning: 可以想像到的最小的部分或顆粒；一點點。
sentences: The term whit refers to the smallest part or particle imaginable; an iota. 術語「惠特」是指可以想像的最小的部分或顆粒；一點點。
The lesson introduced whit as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「whit」作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
She wore a stunning white dress to the gala dinner. 她穿了一件亮麗的白洋裝參加正式晚宴。
The ground was covered with a thick layer of white snow. 地面覆蓋著一層厚厚的白雪。

meaning: 粉刺的一種，表現為皮膚出現白色小腫塊，這是由於皮脂和死皮細胞滯留在皮膚毛孔中，被一層薄薄的上皮細胞堵塞所致。
sentences: Ruth knew that the whiteheads of her teenage acne were a temporary state of affairs, but that did nothing to quell her distress when an eruption hit just before prom. 露絲知道她十幾歲的痤瘡的白頭粉刺只是暫時的情況，但這並不能平息她在舞會前爆發的痛苦。

The term whitehead refers to a type of comedo, manifesting as a small whitish bump of the skin due to retention of sebum and dead skin cells in a skin pore blocked by a thin layer of epithelium. 白頭粉刺一詞指的是一種粉刺，表現為皮膚上出現一個白色的小腫塊，這是由於皮脂和死皮細胞滯留在皮膚毛孔中，被一層薄薄的上皮細胞堵塞。

meaning: 在某方面 顯著 <a rel="mw:Wikied.
sentences: He's a whiz with the computers. 他是計算機方面的 高手 。 他是計算機高手。 他是計算機方面的高手。

The term whiz refers to Someone who is remarkably skilled at something. 「高手」這個字指的是 在某事上 出色 出色 >rel="m/Link="m/Link.com title="skilled">熟練 的人。 「whiz」一詞指的是某件事上非常熟練的人。 「高手」這個字指的是某事上出色 >rel="m/Link="m/Link.com title="skilled">熟練的人。
